packageRules.description: Longhorn v2 data engine cannot live-upgrade. Walk these through manually with the longhorn-upgrade Claude skill.

TeamSpeak 6 server only ships pre-release tags (v6.0.0-betaN). Default docker versioning collapses the -betaN suffix to a variant and ignoreUnstable hides the rest, so neither alone is enough — switch to semver versioning AND opt into unstable so license-refresh betas get picked up.
